mapper.select:
SELECT g.*, c.name as category_name FROM game g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.deleted = 0 AND g.status = 1
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND g.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY g.price ASC
ORDER BY g.price DESC
ORDER BY g.create_time DESC
ORDER BY g.sales DESC
ORDER BY g.create_time DESC

SELECT g.*, c.name as category_name FROM game g LEFT JOIN category c ON g.category_id = c.id WHERE g.deleted = 0
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY g.create_time DESC
